name: Bastard München
description:
💜--// Intense match of UNO.

Bastard München (バスタード・ミュンヘン) is a professional football team in the German leagues in the verse.

It is known as one of the best teams in Europe and is home to the best striker in the world. Bastard München is a team that's absolute priority is scoring goals and they accomplish this by embodying logic and rationality.
creator: Manuko_Aishi
